zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Berkeley於1413年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆時，他的父親Sir Lawrence Berkeley26歲，母親Joan Woodford24歲。他於1438年與Petronella Brokesby在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年5月10日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Berkeley于1413年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Lawrence Berkeley26岁，母亲Joan Woodford24岁。他于1438年与Petronella Brokesby在英国萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年5月10日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Berkeley was born in 1413, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir Lawrence Berkeley, was 26 and his mother, Joan Woodford, was 24. He married Petronella Brokesby in 1438, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 May 1488, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Berkeley est né en 1413, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Lawrence Berkeley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Woodford, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Petronella Brokesby en 1438, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1488, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Berkeley 1413 in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Lawrence Berkeley 26 und seine Mutter Joan Woodford 24. Er hat 1438 in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England Petronella Brokesby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Mai 1488 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Berkeley è nato il nel 1413 nel Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Lawrence Berkeley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Woodford, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Petronella Brokesby nel 1438, nel Wymondham, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1488, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Berkeleyが1413年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムで生まれた時，父Sir Lawrence Berkeleyは26歳，母Joan Woodfordは24歳であった。1438年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムでPetronella Brokesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1488年5月10日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Berkeley(이)가 1413년 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Berkeley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Woodford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1438년 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 Petronella Brokesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 5월 10일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에 묻혔다.

pt.BET 10 MAY 1488 AND 9 JUN 1488: de 10 de maio de 1488 a 9 de junho de 1488
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Berkeley nasceu em 1413, em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Lawrence Berkeley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Woodford, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronella Brokesby em 1438, em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1488, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Berkeley родился в 1413 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Berkeley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Woodford, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronella Brokesby в 1438 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 мая 1488 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Berkeley nació en 1413, en Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Lawrence Berkeley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Woodford, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Petronella Brokesby en 1438, en Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1488, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
